top_repository_name: Ψηφιακό Αποθετήριο της Κεντρικής Βιβλιοθήκης του ΕΜΠ | Dspace@NTUA
Ψηφίδα - Ψηφιακή Βιβλιοθήκη και Ιδρυματικό Καταθετήριο του Πανεπιστημίου Μακεδονίας

count_discrepancy_note: No discrepancy appeared in the checked community/collection samples. The only caveat is that the overall website total had to be derived by summing the three top-community badges, whereas the discover API exposed 12265 directly as totalElements.
content_type_summary: The highest-value branch is the Academic Repository, dominated by Master's theses and doctoral dissertations with direct PDF access and rich metadata. | The Digital Collections branch adds Greek rare monographs and economics journal issues; these are text-rich but more scan/OCR-heavy than the thesis collections. | The Historical Archive is mostly yearbooks, study guides, university newspapers, and institutional publications; it is useful Greek text, but less central than the research repository. | Image-heavy or image-only material is low priority. The dedicated photo archive currently reports zero items. | Some historical items are cataloged as Text but are likely scanned PDFs; extraction quality should be checked after the high-value thesis/dissertation pass.
latest_summary: PYXIDA is a DSpace 7 repository at https://pyxida.aueb.gr/ with stable community, collection, item, and bitstream routes plus multiple machine-readable surfaces. The highest-value whole-collection crawl target is the Academic Repository, especially the large departmental Master's thesis and doctoral dissertation collections; the digital and historical branches add Greek text value but are more scan-heavy and should follow after the thesis/dissertation pass.

count_discrepancy_note: The root page displays 37 top-level communities whose counts sum to 79318, but OAI headers show that a single item can belong to multiple community and collection sets (for example item 11615/13480 appears in both com_11615_17716 and com_11615_1, and in both col_11615_17876 and col_11615_3). Therefore community totals cannot be summed for a unique-item total. The safer unique totals are the site-wide browse count (55141) and the OAI completeListSize (55177). Discover facet totals also drift slightly below displayed collection labels.
content_type_summary: The high-yield body-text corpus is dominated by Greek theses: bachelor 10722, master 11160, doctoral 1642 under the library branch, with departmental communities acting mostly as overlapping set overlays. | The publications branch is large but low-yield for full text: 19735 records, of which only 49 currently expose local files and 19683 are metadata-only according to discover facets. | Legacy library material under ΒΚΠ and related periodical branches contributes Greek journal articles with local PDF, OCR text, and thumbnail bundles; these are valuable but likely noisier than the thesis corpus. | Low-priority or noisy material includes Τεκμήρια υπό επεξεργασία, metadata-only publication records, thumbnail-only derivatives, and image-heavy folklore/special-collection material when no text bundle exists.
latest_summary: UTH LIBRARY is a DSpace 6.3 XMLUI repository rooted at /xmlui/ with strong OAI-PMH and per-item METS surfaces. Unique-item totals converge around 55.1k items, while about 35.4k items appear to have local files and almost all of that file-bearing corpus sits under the library community; the 19.7k publication records branch is almost entirely metadata-only.
